allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('=== SERVERS ==='\); [print\(f\\"{s['region']}: target={s['currentTarget']}, degraded={s['isDegraded']}\\"\) for s in data['servers']]; print\('\\n=== RECENT LOGS ==='\); [print\(f\\"{l['time'][11:19]} [{l['region']}] {l['message']}\\"\) for l in data['logs'][:5]]")
PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Path "RideHailingApi/Data/north.sql" -Encoding Unicode; $lines = $content.Count; Write-Host "Total lines: $lines"; $content | Select-Object -Skip 200 -First 100)
